errorPatterns.condition: storyboard-converter 将 labels 放在顶层而非 data 数组项内部，导致 pptxgenjs createExcelWorksheet 报错 Cannot read properties of undefined
errorPatterns.fix: labels 必须嵌套在 data 每个系列对象内：[{name, labels, values}]，不能是 {data:[{name,values}], labels}

errorPatterns.condition: Multiple layouts (2) without any startY specified - will overlap
